utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final solution: 1) property: Provided with 3 properties, each with address, type, beds/baths, and price. Still, the item is present with details and prices. 2) financing: Terms provided (interest rate range, 5-year fixed), borrowing capacity, rebate eligibility, income and down payment amounts, and a consultation appointment. This is fully specified as a financing solution with terms. 3) legal_services: Named lawyer/firm, cost, consultation time, and included services. Fully specified with costs. 4) moving_services: Provider named, cost, service details, and insurance. Fully specified with costs. 5) setup_services: Utilities listed with providers, combined cost, activation timing, plus property surveys with specific costs depending on property type. Fully specified as utility/setup services; includes survey details though surveys might belong to legal or separate, but accepted. 6) total_budget: Gives property price range, down payment, itemized additional costs (legal, moving, utilities, survey), totals for additional costs, and borrowing capacity. All 6 items appear and are fully specified with required details and costs where applicable.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution lists three purchase properties and several services. We must match each named item to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. The properties 'Family House', 'Historic Townhouse', and 'New Build' exist under purchase_properties with ratings 10, 6, and 8 respectively. The legal service 'Premium Legal Package' matches essential_legal_services with rating 9. The moving service 'Premium Moving' matches moving_services with rating 9. The utilities setup described as 'Premium Utilities Package' corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' under utility_setup with rating 9. The property surveys referenced are 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9) and 'New Build Inspection' (rating 8).
